name: Sauteed Venison Liver with Apple Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the venison liver into 1/2 inch slices and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
2. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a skillet. Add chopped onion and venison liver slices, and sauté for about 5 minutes over medium heat (overcooking toughens the liver).
3. Melt the remaining butter in a separate saucepan over low heat. Fry apple slices until tender and done.
4. Serve the liver topped with cooked apple slices sprinkled with brown sugar and cinnamon.
5. Garnish with crisp bacon strips and tomato wedges. Nice with freshly baked biscuits.
